titles.skillsText: These are some of the technologies and tools I have worked with.
titles.contactText: You can contact me through the following links or by sending an email directly:

profile.name: Maximiliano Seligmann
profile.subtitle: Web Developer | Full Stack | Python | PHP | React
profile.aboutText: I am a passionate web developer who loves programming and creating modern, functional solutions. I discovered my interest in programming during my first year studying Computer Science at Facultad de Ciencias Exactas, Ingeniería y Agrimensura, UNR (Rosario, Argentina). For personal reasons, I relocated to Spain, where I completed a Full Stack development course to continue learning. Currently, I am studying Web Application Development and actively looking for internship and professional opportunities to add value to real-world projects. Meanwhile, I build independent solutions such as web scrapers, automations, and responsive web applications.

experience.description: Creation of web scrapers and automated bots using Python and Selenium. Development of full-stack management applications with React, Django, Laravel, and Spring Boot, connected to relational databases.
Official training in web interface design, server programming (PHP, Java), markup languages, databases, and application deployment.

projects.title: TGUIAS
projects.description: A video game guide platform. It is a full-stack web application designed for users to consult guides, achievements, and other relevant information about video games.

projects.title: This Dynamic Portfolio
projects.description: Web application of this portfolio, built with reactive components and instant multilingual support.

projects.title: Banking Application
projects.description: A basic banking application with a Spring Boot backend and Angular frontend, connected to MySQL.

projects.title: Gym Routine Manager
projects.description: A web application to create and manage workout routines with a Django REST API and React frontend.

projects.title: Chess Engine
projects.description: A Python chess engine with checkmate detection and full game logic, playable in the console.

projects.title: Amazon Price Tracker
projects.description: A Python scraper that gets prices from Amazon and sends automatic notifications via Telegram.
